assumptionUnderAudit.name: FOR-286 reconstructed A8 SrcIn payload store is a runtime root write
assumptionUnderAudit.why: The same 59 root coordinates have 59/59 reconstructed red kSrcOver writes, but FOR-290 observes 59/59 root dispatch writes with white kSrc source payload and no red root stores.

modelInputsCompared.sourceBlur: FOR-286/FOR-288: 59/59 partial non-zero blur mask alpha on target pixels; FOR-290 root events do not carry blur-mask fields.
modelInputsCompared.mask: FOR-286/FOR-288: 59/59 non-zero mask support on the same target pixels.
modelInputsCompared.coverageAndClip: FOR-286/FOR-288: 59/59 full active-AA clip coverage; FOR-290 root dispatch coverage is also 255 for 59/59 pixels.
modelInputsCompared.coordinates: The derived 59 target root coordinates match exactly across FOR-286/FOR-288 and FOR-290.
modelInputsCompared.blendMode: FOR-286 reconstructs kSrcOver; FOR-290 root dispatch observes kSrc for 59/59 pixels.
modelInputsCompared.sourcePayload: FOR-286 reconstructs red SrcIn payload for 59/59 pixels; FOR-290 root dispatch observes white source payload for 59/59 pixels.
modelInputsCompared.deviceLayer: FOR-290 observed 118/118 events on root and 0 temporary events under its root-dimension trace; FOR-286 has no runtime device/layer evidence for the reconstructed red store.
